text.message: i'm going sheep port btw red, 3:1 is yours
If you wanted wheat should have robbed red
haven't even built a road tho
Ya you just had 3-4 wheat in hand
if u hold cards for me i can trade that
5 rolled so you have it now
hey orange i 1:1'd for u too
I’ll always honor a deal but I wasn’t under the impression we were making one
wasn't a deal, just thought we'd help each other out esp with blue being this strong
1:1 and i'll help u out in the future
Well red just became a problem
You have best stone best wheat good road
i def don't have best road
i capped off at 8 or 9 roads
avg colonist table talk by red
so i'm not winning road nor army
not sure what you mean oj
By way behind you mean tied for lead?
I’m going to keep living in reality
i'm not even going for road
i be lucky if i can get 2 open settles
well oj seems to think i'm winning
and you seem to think i am..
Your not last that’s all stop crying
low production, lose road and lose army so how am i not?
look how far behind i'm against black and blue
shows how much u know this game oj
oj also claims i have the best wheat like nobody here can count
feed oj road and me army
might have been a bad block by me
so you give me the 2 non bricks
I can’t feed you even cards
trading with red is also totally fine
I took road we don’t lose
Just setting blue up to retake road
i had to play the knight in case blue had one
They have two vp and road army potential
Don’t rush the trade with leader I would have matched
and he's not that far ahead
there's his city unless we roll 7
you win with army and road
At some point it’s just you winning black lol
yea blue road settle wins too
Ok so you stop me from building road ??
All black needs is city they should be rob right now
why do you rob me then
u've been saying gg black for 15 minutes
